data.biography: 王天辰，1993年2月4日出生于北京，中国内地男演员，2016年毕业于上海戏剧学院表演系
data.name: 王天辰

data.biography: Wang Tian Chen is a Chinese actor. He made his acting debut in the 2017 television drama “General and I.” He has since appeared in the film “Youth” (2017) and the dramas “The Way We Were” (2018) and “Tang Dynasty Tour” (2018).
data.name: Wang Tianchen

data.biography: 王天辰，1993 年 2 月 4 日出生於北京，中國內地男演員，2016 年畢業於上海戲劇學院表演系
data.name: 王天辰
